name: topo_edit_workbench_v7
label: Topo Edit Workbench v7 Laptop Responsive
author: Esri R&D Center Beijing + OpenAI custom workbench extension
description: Custom topology editing workbench v7 for Experience Builder with laptop responsive scrolling, persistent lasso vertex deletion, selectable revert history, icon-driven tools, built-in trace toggle for reshape, preview/apply workflows, configurable KPI monitors, selection export, and freehand or click-by-click polygon analysis drawing.

dataActions.label: Topo Edit Workbench v7 Laptop Responsive
